name: Spicy Red Onion-Poblano Chile Relish
recipeIngredient: 2 medium Red onions, diced into medium pieces
peeled, seeded, and diced into medium pieces
recipeInstructions:
Juice of 1 lime
Salt to taste
Bring a large sauté pan to medium heat; add oil. Add onions and sauté until soft but not mushy for about 5 minutes.
Combine all ingredients in a bowl and toss well. Let the relish marinate for 20 minutes before serving at room temperature.
Typed for you by the officially curried Cathy Harned.
Recipe from The Herb Garden Cookbook by Lucinda Hutson. Houston, TX: Gulf Publishing Co./Book Division/P.O. Box 2608/Houston, TX 77252-2608. ISBN 0-87719-215-4
